name: BEAT LOCK
conditioned_path: looping audio meme that hijacks the brain into replaying the same 15-second clip on repeat
mechanic: A glowing bar pulses left-to-right on a synthesized beat; tap once per pulse exactly as it peaks. Clean locks stack a visible combo multiplier. Miss one and the combo resets with a jarring off-beat flash. 32 beats, then it ends on the drop.

name: DROP CATCH
conditioned_path: bass-drop audio memes that condition anticipation of the exact moment the beat hits
mechanic: The screen counts down with rising visual noise; tap the exact frame the drop lands. Hold too long before or after and it registers as a miss. Score is deviation in milliseconds from the drop — share your ms and dare a friend.

name: TEMPO CLIMB
conditioned_path: trending tempo-ramp audio where the beat accelerates until the listener physically can't keep up
mechanic: Dots scroll down a lane at the beat tempo; tap each as it crosses the line. Every 8 beats the BPM notches up. Miss two in a row and the track cuts. How far up the tempo ladder can you ride before it breaks you?

name: FLOW CHAIN
conditioned_path: looping ASMR beats that lock the brain into a repetition trance with no exit
mechanic: Tap a sequence of color-coded zones on the beat to build a chain. Each perfect hit extends the chain and deepens the visual glow. One off-beat tap breaks the chain and scores zero for that segment. 64-beat track, then it resolves.

name: OFF-BEAT TRAP
conditioned_path: syncopated audio memes that trip up listeners with deliberate off-beat hooks
mechanic: Most beats signal with a flash; the scoring beat is silent — tap in the gap between flashes. Tapping on any lit flash scores zero. The mechanic trains the body to feel the off-beat the way the track buries it.

name: BPM DUEL
conditioned_path: viral 'who has better rhythm' challenge clips where two people race the same beat
mechanic: A shared beat plays; your accuracy % after 32 taps is your dare score. Send the link with your score visible — the receiver sees your bar when they start, daring them to beat it. One song, one minute, settled.

name: GHOST BEAT
conditioned_path: layered loop tracks that add invisible percussion hits the ear barely registers
mechanic: A beat plays with one ghost hit hidden in each bar — no visual cue, only ear. Tap when you feel the ghost percussion. Score is how many ghost hits you catch across 16 bars. Trains the ear the loop has been hijacking.

name: PULSE HOLD
conditioned_path: sustained-note audio memes where the payoff is holding the tone exactly as long as it lasts
mechanic: A note sustains — press and hold for exactly its duration, then release. The error (too short or too long) is shown in ms. Ten notes of varying length per session; PB is the lowest total error.

name: RHYTHM MIRROR
conditioned_path: TikTok duet rhythmic challenges where one side plays a pattern and the other must mirror it
mechanic: A 4-beat pattern plays on the left half of the screen; tap the right half to repeat it back perfectly. Pattern grows by one beat each round. Dare score is the longest pattern mirrored before a miss.

name: DRUM FILL
conditioned_path: drum-fill reaction clips where the fill is the only moment that matters in an otherwise repetitive track
mechanic: A steady beat loops, then a fill window opens for 2 seconds. Tap a freeform burst of hits in that window; a groove-accuracy meter scores how well your hits land in sub-beat pockets. One fill, one score, one dare.

name: SILENT BAR
conditioned_path: viral 4'33" / silent-drop memes that train anticipation of a beat that never comes
mechanic: A track plays normally for 3 bars then cuts to silence. Tap on the exact phantom beat where bar 4 should land. The grid shows where the beat was — your timing distance is your score. Silence as the highest-difficulty rhythm challenge.

name: COMBO SUSTAIN
conditioned_path: rhythm-game combo-counter clips shared as status signals of flow mastery
mechanic: Tap on every beat of a 60-second track to sustain a combo counter. Each perfect tap adds to the multiplier; an early or late tap resets to zero. The session ends exactly at beat 60 — the wean is the track having a last beat.

name: TAP TWIN
conditioned_path: split-screen comparison clips that spark a tribal 'which side is you?' engagement loop
mechanic: Two rhythm tracks play simultaneously at different tempos; tap along with whichever you choose. Your locked-in tempo vs. the one you didn't pick is the rivalry score. Share the result with your twin and see whose rhythm held.

name: RHYTHM WEAN
conditioned_path: seamless audio loops that never resolve — the same 8-bar phrase repeating with no end signal
mechanic: A gentle looping beat plays; tap on each pulse to build a soft glowing ring. After 32 beats the ring is complete and the track resolves with a final chord — a hard, satisfying end instead of another loop. Calm flow with a real finish.

name: BREATH BEAT
conditioned_path: binaural / breathing-paced audio loops that hijack the inhale-exhale cycle into endless replay
mechanic: A soft pulse sets the inhale; hold during the beat, release on the rest. Each matched breath-beat pair calms the visual — the screen warms and slows. After 10 matched breath cycles the track ends and the screen holds still.

name: SLOW TAP
conditioned_path: fast-loop audio memes that spike heart rate by compressing beat intervals
mechanic: The beat starts fast and you must tap along — but each perfectly-timed tap lengthens the next interval by a fraction. You are literally slowing the track with your own precision. The session ends when the tempo reaches 40 BPM and holds.

name: ONE BAR LOOP
conditioned_path: one-bar loop audio memes that auto-replay exactly one measure until the listener tunes out
mechanic: A single 4-beat bar repeats; tap on every beat of every loop. The challenge: how many perfect loops in a row without a miss? Each perfect loop tightens the accuracy window. 16 loops and the track signs off — the loop that ends.

name: GROOVE SCORE
conditioned_path: trending "rate your rhythm" challenge clips that bait self-assessment and sharing
mechanic: A 30-second groove plays; tap freely to any sub-beat you feel. An AI-feel meter scores how consistently your taps align to the micro-groove vs. the macro beat. Share your Groove Score — the shareable number drives the dare.

name: BEAT SKIP
conditioned_path: edited loop clips that drop one beat every few bars to create the "wait, something\'s off" hook
mechanic: A steady beat plays — but every 8th beat is silent. Tap on all normal beats; do NOT tap on the silent one. Your streak is how many bars you navigate without tapping the hole. The loop ends at bar 16.

name: FINAL BAR
conditioned_path: endless loop tracks engineered to never signal that the song is over
mechanic: A short musical phrase plays and you tap along gently; after exactly 8 bars a resolution chord lands and the screen fades to soft black. Nothing loops. The whole game is the satisfaction of an 8-bar phrase that actually ends — flow state, then done.
